files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index c1557c8..31fd133 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -369,2 +369,7 @@ Day 378 / Week 54 observations:
 - Remaining base is almost entirely S2 C (~42.1k); A is nearly gone (~571). Harvest should optimize around C revenue and compute cost.
 - Week 54 adjustment: cut quotas again to A=10k/B=50k/C=150k and move capacity to tier 4. Keep C tier 4, A tier 1, no credits, $5k/day ops, and zero dev/ad spend.
+
+Day 385 / Week 55 observations:
+- Cash rose slightly to $1.72M. Subscribers fell to 31,548 and usage fell to 44.9M/week. Tier 4 had 6.7% peak overload but no outage.
+- Remaining base is S2 C (~31.3k) plus a tiny B remainder. Churn is still mostly C.
+- Week 55 adjustment: keep tier 4 but reduce quotas again to A=5k/B=25k/C=100k to reduce compute and overload. Keep C tier 4, no credits, $5k/day ops, and no dev/ad spend.
